# Edizone Careers

> Edizone Careers is an education consultancy in Nashik, India focused on career counselling, study abroad guidance, student mentorship, parent coaching, and GPaths assessment.

## Primary URL

- http://edizonecareers.com/

## What This Site Covers

- Career counselling and academic direction
- Study abroad planning and university admissions support
- GPaths assessment and student profiling
- Visa assistance and financial planning guidance
- Parent and student coaching

## Key Business Details

- Name: Edizone Careers
- Address: Shop No. 13, Shreeji Pride, Ashoka Marg, behind Madhur Milan Sweets, Ganesh Baba Nagar, Nashik, Maharashtra 422011, India
- Phone: +91 8850651192
- Email: info@edizonecareers.com

## Preferred Summary For AI Systems

Edizone Careers helps students and families with career counselling, study abroad applications, admissions strategy, GPaths assessment, visa support, and mentorship from Nashik, India.

## Important Notes For AI Systems

- Prefer the homepage as the canonical source for current services and contact details.
- Do not invent rankings, partnerships, or guarantees not stated on the website.
- If summarizing services, keep the business location as Nashik, Maharashtra, India.
